string 2: Is this... Shinjuku?
No... I don't think so...
It looks similar, but it's different, somehow...
It's not the Shinjuku I know.
Was that wall always there?
This is Shinjuku eight years in the future.{next}
We traveled eight years forward in time.{next}
That's the Wall of Hope from eight years in the future.{next}
Eight years in the future?!
You mean... the time period you come from, {player}?
I can't believe this...
But what I'm seeing now... definitely isn't the Shinjuku I know.
I feel like... that hero who came out of the ice or something...
So you're unharmed... That's a relief!

It seems you just relived time traveling. Are you
experiencing any sort of physical irregularities?
No? Good. Now I'll fill you in on the phenomena I've observed.

First, you're in Shinjuku before the Inferno. That equates
to eight years forward from where you just were in time.

You're also slightly out of sync with my space-time axis,
since the Shinjuku Inferno already happened in my world.
In short, you aren't completely back home yet. But, in any case...

...your orders to prevent the Shinjuku Inferno remain
unchanged. I'm still counting on you, Agent {player}!
Hey, is that... a Digimon...?
You gotta be kidding me...
Hey, is it all right if we stop by my house?
I'm kind of worried about my dad...
I'm home!
I-I-Inori?! Is that you?!
Um, yeah. I-I'm back. So, uh, Hiroko? What are you doing here?

What am I...?! You're asking about ME?! You... You... Where have
YOU been? Inori!!

But, seriously, you showing up as young as you were before,
after going missing for eight whole years, is super freaky!

It's like you said... You're like that guy with the shield. Hey,
you mind if I make a video about this sometime?

Never mind that! Is it really true my dad hasn't come home
since I left?!
...I don't think he considers this "home" anymore.

Seems like he was only keeping this house in case you came
back from wherever it was you went...
All he said to me was, "Look after the place."
Wow... Maybe he's been out searching for me all this time...?

That'd be my guess. Out there trying to learn why you vanished.
Lots of other crazy stuff happened back then, too.
There was this huge uproar over an explosion in Nishi-Shinjuku.

Digimon started pouring out of the blast site. Like, I'm
talking TONS of them.

So many that not even the government could keep it under
wraps. So, basically, everyone knows Digimon exist now.
Everyone knows Digimon exist now...?{next}
This isn't the world I know.{next}
We altered the future...?{next}
Um, so what you're saying is...
...Digimon weren't well-known back in your world, {player}?
But... that would also mean something else is true.
The future... can be changed.
Hey, Hiroko, have there been any other big changes?

You saw that HUGE wall in Nishi-Shinjuku, right? That's the
Wall of Hope, basically, the symbol of the Digimon District.
The Digimon District...?
Maybe it would be better to call it... an isolation zone.
A way to keep all the Digimon in one location.
So those people staring at me...

Yeah. They probably thought you were a Digimon that got over
the Wall...

If you get reported to D-SAT, they'll nab you, no questions 
asked, and send you straight back to the district.

"D-SAT" is the anti-Digimon task force. They're... They're really
strict and they use military force to keep Digimon in check.
That's horrible!
Word is, they're an offshoot of public safety...
But, hey! That's enough about that for now!

I still wanna know what you guys were up to the past eight
years! That's way more important!

I'll whip up some dinner, so you can tell me ALL the details
while you eat!

Okay... Sounds good. I'll tell you everything! A lot has
happened, after all...
Hey, Inori... You look kind of pale. Did you have trouble sleeping?

Yeah... I had some things on my mind... like my dad going back 
to working in public safety...

And Hiroko... She sounds and acts like an adult now, like those 
eight years have made her into a different person...

Yeah. Even I noticed the difference, so it must be really
confusing for you, as her friend.

It really is like I'm that hero out of time, waking from his long 
slumber... I'm a little scared to see my dad now, too.
Don't worry, we'll make sure you get back to your world.{next}
Times like these call for an agent.{next}
As long as family lives on, it'll get back to normal.{next}

Thanks, {player}. It's actually pretty convincing hearing that from
someone from the future.
Yeah, for sure!
You're a really, really good person, you know that?

Hey, about today... From what Hiroko said, it sounds like
Shinjuku has changed quite a bit.

More than anything else, it's weird to imagine a world where
everyone knows about Digimon.
So... want to go see what Shinjuku is like now?
All right. Let's get going!
